client.name: Gaurang Gohil - Learning Operations & Compliance Training
client.label: Learning operations and regulatory training leader with enterprise LMS, analytics, and global compliance-training delivery experience
client.work_authorization: Permanent Polish Residence Card (EU long-term resident) - authorized to work in Poland/EU without sponsorship; immediate availability

core_positioning.notes: This profile is specifically for learning operations, LMS leadership, learning enablement, and compliance/regulatory training leadership roles. Best-fit targets include Learning Operations Manager, Learning Program Manager, Compliance Training Lead, Regulatory Training Manager, Learning Enablement Lead, and operations-focused L&D roles in regulated environments. Keep this backend profile separate from the compliance-risk leadership version so the AI can optimize specifically for training, LMS, enablement, and learning-operations language without drifting into audit/control-heavy positioning.

summary_base: Learning operations and regulatory training leader with 9+ years of experience running enterprise learning delivery, LMS administration, training support, learning analytics, and operational improvement across global financial-services environments.

Strongest evidence includes supporting 30,000+ learners/partners, delivering 150+ global programs, maintaining 95%+ SLA and satisfaction results, and driving 80% efficiency gains through process and system optimization.
Best positioned for Learning Operations, Compliance Training Leadership, LMS/Enablement, and regulated-learning roles where scale, operational rigor, analytics, and stakeholder coordination matter.

experience.summary: Senior learning-operations role leading enterprise delivery, learning support, analytics, and operational improvement for a global regulated organization.
highlights: **Managed end-to-end learning operations for 30,000+ global learners across 200 countries** in a complex, regulated environment.
**Delivered 80% efficiency improvement** through AI-driven automation, LMS optimization, and process redesign.
**Led Tier 1/2/3 learning support operations with 95%+ SLA compliance** across learning requests, issue resolution, and service quality.
**Created SOPs and LMS administration playbooks for a 15-person team** to improve consistency, onboarding, and quality control.
**Implemented learning analytics dashboards that improved program effectiveness by 40%** and strengthened decision-making for leadership.
**Orchestrated 20+ learning technology projects with 100% on-time delivery** across cross-functional stakeholders.
**Delivered 150+ global training programs with 95%+ completion and satisfaction rates**.
**Managed board-level reporting tied to $10M+ learning investments** and translated operational metrics into executive updates.

experience.summary: People and operations leadership role across learning delivery, vendor coordination, KPI management, and large-scale learner support.
highlights: **Coached a team of 15 learning operations specialists** and increased team capability by 75% through structured leadership and support.
**Managed vendor onboarding and contract negotiations** that delivered 20% cost savings.
**Scaled learning delivery to 30,000+ partners with 100+ sessions** achieving 95%+ satisfaction.
**Streamlined workflows across 7-10 departments** to align learning operations with broader business strategy.
**Maintained 95% SLA performance across 500+ monthly learning requests** in a high-volume operating environment.
**Developed KPI tracking across 15+ operational metrics** to support data-driven optimization.

experience.summary: Team-lead role combining LMS administration, enablement support, process improvement, and operational coaching.
highlights: **Improved team performance by 75%** through coaching and mentorship of 15 team members.
**Administered an enterprise LMS for 30,000+ users** including content deployment, user support, and reporting.
**Reduced learner onboarding time by 70%** from 7 days to 3 days through process automation.
**Improved content relevance and engagement by 60%** through learning-library enhancements and operational coordination.
**Coordinated LMS enhancements with IT** to reduce manual processing time by 30%.

experience.summary: Frontline training and LMS role supporting learner readiness, regulatory training delivery, reporting, and operational support.
highlights: **Delivered monthly training to 2,000+ stakeholders** with 100% completion rates.
**Improved new-partner readiness by 60%** through targeted role-specific training programs.
**Created learning analytics reports** to track completion, participation, and program effectiveness.
**Resolved 200+ monthly system issues with 95%+ first-contact resolution**.
**Supported compliance and onboarding readiness at scale** through structured training delivery, LMS usage, and learner support.

certifications: Postgraduate Diploma in Psychology of Leadership
